title: Spotlight Feature: AquaFunded Unveils a Phenomenal 45% Off Spring Premiere!
description: Today's script features AquaFunded's latest blockbuster offer, revealing an incredible 45% discount and a spectacular 200% refund on your fourth payout. This is your cue to achieve trading glory.
seo_content:
AquaFunded 45% Off + X2 Refund Spring Deal

AquaFunded has launched a standout spring promotion featuring 45% OFF all challenges paired with a remarkable 200% refund on your fourth payout. Use code SPRING to activate this deal and take advantage of one of the most rewarding compound-refund offers in the prop trading market — giving you both an immediate discount and a long-term bonus that grows as you trade.

AquaFunded is a forex proprietary trading firm recognized for building a premium trading environment that combines institutional-level execution with an accessible and transparent challenge structure. The firm operates under a clear set of trading rules and supports an expanding roster of funded traders worldwide.

With code SPRING, you receive 45% off the challenge fee upfront, reducing your cost significantly across all account tiers. The standout feature of this promotion is the 200% refund on your fourth payout — meaning the longer you trade consistently with AquaFunded, the greater your cumulative return on your original investment. This incentivizes sustained performance and rewards traders who make it a permanent home.

AquaFunded's trading conditions include a 90% profit split, clearly defined maximum drawdown limits, and support for multiple trading platforms including MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker. The firm places no restrictions on trading style beyond standard risk parameters, allowing for scalping, swing trading, and EA use within defined guidelines.

To claim this spring offer, visit AquaFunded via the link above, select any challenge account, and enter code SPRING at checkout for your immediate 45% savings. The 200% fourth-payout refund will be tracked automatically to your account once you become a funded trader. Act before the promotion expires on December 31, 2026.
